Community-owned

The Village Shop

Run for our community by our community — with a Post Office, local produce and a defibrillator outside the door.

Our village shop sells a wide range of basic provisions, alcoholic drinks and a growing range of local and fresh produce, baked goods and gift items.

Just outside the shop we have the village post box and our defibrillator station.

Opening Hours

Shop Every day, 9am – 2pm
Post Office Friday, 9am – 10am

Check our Facebook page for last-minute changes.

Contact & Find Us

☎ 01556 600456
✉ palnackievillageshop@yahoo.co.uk
f Facebook page
📍 Palnackie Village Shop Ltd, Glen Road, DG7 1PH, Palnackie

The shop also shares premises with Flounders Community Cafe — Scotland's award-winning community cafe right next door.
